manifests.contents:
[workspace]
members = ["crates/consumer", "crates/listener_core", "crates/shared/broker", "crates/test-support"]
resolver = "2"

[workspace.dependencies]
alloy-json-rpc = "1.6.1"
alloy-transport-ipc = "1.6.1"
async-trait = "0.1.89"
futures = "0.3.31"
serde = "1.0.228"
serde_json = "1.0.149"
thiserror = "2.0.18"
tokio-util = "0.7"
tracing = "0.1.44"

[workspace.dependencies.alloy]
version = "1.6.1"
features = ["full", "trie", "rpc-types", "network", "consensus", "rlp"]

[workspace.dependencies.alloy-primitives]
version = "1"
features = ["serde"]

[workspace.dependencies.tokio]
version = "1.49.0"
features = ["rt-multi-thread", "sync", "time"]

[workspace.package]
edition = "2024"

[profile.release]
opt-level = 3
lto = true
codegen-units = 1

[profile.release.package]

[package]
name = "consumer"
version = "0.0.1"

[package.edition]
workspace = true

[dependencies.alloy]
workspace = true

[dependencies.async-trait]
workspace = true

[dependencies.broker]
path = "../shared/broker"

[dependencies.primitives]
path = "../shared/primitives"

[dependencies.serde]
workspace = true

[dependencies.serde_json]
workspace = true

[dependencies.thiserror]
workspace = true

[dependencies.tracing]
workspace = true

[dev-dependencies.redis]
version = "0.29"
features = ["tokio-comp", "aio"]

[dev-dependencies.test-support]
path = "../test-support"

[dev-dependencies.tokio]
workspace = true
features = ["rt-multi-thread", "sync", "time", "macros"]

[[test]]
path = "tests/watch_e2e.rs"
name = "watch_e2e"
required-features = []

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"
name = "consumer"
required-features = []
crate-type = ["lib"]

[package]
name = "listener_core"
version = "0.0.1"

[package.edition]
workspace = true

[dependencies]
anyhow = "1.0"
derivative = "2.2"
rand = "0.9.2"
tracing-subscriber = "0.3.22"
url = "2.5.8"

[dependencies.alloy]
workspace = true

[dependencies.alloy-json-rpc]
workspace = true

[dependencies.alloy-transport-ipc]
workspace = true

[dependencies.async-trait]
workspace = true

[dependencies.broker]
path = "../shared/broker"

[dependencies.chrono]
version = "0.4"
features = ["serde"]

[dependencies.config]
version = "0.14"
features = ["yaml"]

[dependencies.futures]
workspace = true

[dependencies.primitives]
path = "../shared/primitives"

[dependencies.reqwest]
version = "0.13.2"
features = ["json"]

[dependencies.serde]
workspace = true
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.serde_json]
workspace = true

[dependencies.sqlx]
version = "0.8"
features = ["runtime-tokio", "postgres", "migrate", "uuid", "chrono"]

[dependencies.thiserror]
workspace = true

[dependencies.tokio]
workspace = true
features = ["rt-multi-thread", "signal"]

[dependencies.tokio-util]
workspace = true

[dependencies.tracing]
workspace = true

[dependencies.uuid]
version = "1"
features = ["v4", "serde"]

[[bin]]
path = "src/main.rs"
name = "listener_core"
required-features = []

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"
name = "listener_core"
required-features = []
crate-type = ["lib"]

[package]
name = "broker"
version = "0.0.1"

[package.edition]
workspace = true

[dependencies]
arc-swap = "1"

[dependencies.async-trait]
workspace = true

[dependencies.futures]
workspace = true

[dependencies.lapin]
version = "4.0.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.redis]
version = "0.29"
features = ["tokio-comp", "aio", "streams", "connection-manager"]
optional = true

[dependencies.serde]
workspace = true
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.serde_json]
workspace = true
features = ["raw_value"]

[dependencies.thiserror]
workspace = true

[dependencies.tokio]
workspace = true
features = ["rt-multi-thread", "sync", "time", "macros"]

[dependencies.tokio-util]
workspace = true

[dependencies.tracing]
workspace = true

[dependencies.uuid]
version = "1"
features = ["v7"]

[dev-dependencies.test-support]
path = "../../test-support"

[dev-dependencies.testcontainers]
version = "0.23"
features = ["reusable-containers"]

[dev-dependencies.testcontainers-modules]
version = "0.11"
features = ["redis", "rabbitmq"]

[features]
amqp = ["dep:lapin"]
default = ["redis", "amqp"]
redis = ["dep:redis"]

[[test]]
path = "tests/amqp_e2e.rs"
name = "amqp_e2e"
required-features = []

[[test]]
path = "tests/broker_e2e.rs"
name = "broker_e2e"
required-features = []

[[test]]
path = "tests/redis_e2e.rs"
name = "redis_e2e"
required-features = []

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"
name = "broker"
required-features = []
crate-type = ["lib"]

[package]
name = "primitives"
version = "0.0.1"

[package.edition]
workspace = true

[dependencies.alloy]
version = "1.6.1"
features = ["full"]

[dependencies.serde]
workspace = true
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.thiserror]
workspace = true

[dev-dependencies.serde_json]
workspace = true

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"
name = "primitives"
required-features = []
crate-type = ["lib"]

[package]
name = "test-support"
version = "0.0.1"

[package.edition]
workspace = true

[dependencies.testcontainers]
version = "0.23"
features = ["reusable-containers"]

[dependencies.testcontainers-modules]
version = "0.11"
features = ["redis"]

[dependencies.tokio]
workspace = true

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"
name = "test_support"
required-features = []
crate-type = ["lib"]
